summary: Tests cover all main requirements (max-age, max-total-size, keep-latest-N, dry-run, summary) and have good structural organization with clean setup/teardown. However, assertions are severely loose—checking only for keyword presence (e.g., `[[ "$output" == *"delete"* ]]`) rather than validating actual behavior or values. No edge case testing (boundary dates, invalid input formats, ties in date ordering), no verification of computed numbers in summary output, and no rigorous validation of multi-workflow scenarios. Would miss off-by-one errors, incorrect date calculations, wrong artifact selection logic, and incorrect summary totals. Strong test structure undermined by weak assertions.
